---
name: Bug report
about: Report something in the app that is broken or behaving unexpectedly
title: ""
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

<!--
Write for someone who has never opened this app. Walk them through exactly what
happened, step by step. Name the screen/route you were on, and name buttons and
controls by their visible label. Never assume prior context.
-->

## What you were trying to do

<!-- Your goal or intent, in a sentence or two.
     e.g. "I was trying to advance my character from Sequence 9 to Sequence 8." -->

## Steps to reproduce

<!-- A numbered list of concrete UI actions — one interaction per step. Start
     from a known state (logged in? which character? which route?). Say which
     screen you were on and which control you used. -->

1. Start on `<screen / route, e.g. /play with an active character>`
2. Click the **`<button/control label>`**
3. Type `<...>` into the **`<field label>`**
4. …

## Expected result

<!-- What you expected to happen after the last step. -->

## Actual result

<!-- What actually happened instead. Be specific: error text, a frozen screen,
     a wrong value, or nothing at all. -->

## Environment

- Browser + OS: <!-- e.g. Chrome 126 on macOS 14 -->
- Route / screen: <!-- e.g. /play -->
- Auth / character state: <!-- logged in? which character? pathway / sequence? -->

## Console / network errors

<!-- Any browser console messages or failed network requests (status codes,
     error bodies), if you have them. -->

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- Drag in images or a screen recording if they help. -->

## Additional context

<!-- Anything else that would help someone reproduce or understand the bug. -->
